issues.name: No machine-readable business identity
issues.description: AI tools cannot identify what this business does, where it operates, or what services it offers.

issues.name: No review or rating signals for AI
issues.description: AI shopping agents cannot cite customer reviews or ratings when recommending this business.

issues.name: No FAQ content formatted for AI
issues.description: Missing FAQ content means AI cannot answer common questions about the business directly.

issues.name: No AI context file (llms.txt)
issues.description: No llms.txt file to guide AI crawlers on what the business does and what pages matter.

issues.name: No shipping or return policy visible to AI
issues.description: AI shopping agents look for commerce trust signals like shipping and return information.
